title: epistylium roxburghii
intro: Epistylium roxburghii, also known as Roxburgh's epistylium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epistylium roxburghii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antidote for various poisons. Epistylium roxburghii is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
